title: Ivory Unscented Pillar Candles 7.5cm x 15cm (2.75" x 6") Rustic Smokeless Candles Long Burn Time 65 hrs Elegant Non-Drip Pillar Candles for Weddings Restaurant Home Decoration Spa Church (2 pcs)
features: RUSTIC IVORY PILLAR CANDLES Elevate the ambiance of any space with our luxurious Ivory Pillar Candles. Measuring a substantial 70mm in diameter by 150mm in height, these elegant candles are designed to make a statement. Crafted with the highest-quality paraffin wax, they boast a creamy ivory hue that effortlessly complements any decor scheme, from minimalist modern to ornate traditional.

LONG BURN TIME Our Ivory Pillar Candles are engineered to offer a clean, long-lasting burn. Each candle features a pure cotton wick which, when trimmed regularly, ensures a slow, even burn free from unsightly sooting or tunneling. The wax used in this pillar candle is of the highest calibre and is made the Europe. With a burn time of generously over 65 hours, these candles provide enduring warmth and a serene glow, perfect for dinner parties or quiet evenings at home.

VERSATILE Whether your setting is an event, a dining room table, a fireplace mantle or bathroom countertop, these candles will add that special magical touch that you will love! Ideal for weddings, upscale events, or simply enhancing your daily living environment, these candles are unscented, thus promising an allergy-friendly and unobtrusive presence. They maintain the focus on visual beauty and ambient lighting without competing with your chosen fragrances or dining experiences.

SAFETY FIRST Safety and quality are paramount. Our Ivory Pillar Candles are meticulously manufactured to adhere to strict safety standards, ensuring they are as reliable as they are beautiful. Each candle is individually wrapped, preserving its pristine condition until you are ready to display its timeless elegance.

TIMELESS ELEGANCE AND SOOTHING COSY LIGHTING Pair them with ornate candle holders for a classic look, or set them on a sleek, modern tray for a more contemporary aesthetic. Group them together at different heights for a dynamic centerpiece or place them individually around your home for a scattered, soft lighting effect. The soothing presence of these candles as they gently flicker will add warmth and sophistication to any occasion, promising compliments from your guests.
